character.definition: to chew; to masticate, to dwell on, Chinese medicine term
withered; faded; to die, a minor illness (of foot and hand)
half-raw meat; not well cooked meat, the light or grow of fire, raw meat, offensive smell, especially of fish or blood, thin sliced meat
incorruptible; honest; clean, (same as 歉) deficient, poor crop or harvest, to regret; sorry, (same as 餡) anything serving as stuffing for dumplings, etc.
cakes pf leaven; yeast, ferment for brewing, crumbs of barley
matte, a crude mixture of sulfides formed in smelting sulfide ores
